_dependencyNotes.compatibilityStrategy: Staying on Astro 5 for stability. Astro 6 upgrade deferred to 6-12 months.

astro.notes: Compatible with all current integrations. Latest is 6.1.9 but requires significant migration (Node 22+, Zod 4, Tailwind 4, integration updates).

@astrojs/cloudflare.notes: Downgraded from 13.2.0 (which requires Astro 6). Last version compatible with Astro 5.

@astrojs/mdx.notes: Latest is 5.0.4 but requires Astro 6. Current version works with Astro 5.

@astrojs/react.notes: Supports React 17, 18, and 19. Latest is 5.0.4 but requires Astro 6.

@astrojs/tailwind.notes: Does NOT support Astro 6. Requires Tailwind CSS 3.0.24+. For Tailwind 4, use @tailwindcss/vite instead.

@astrojs/sitemap.notes: Updated to latest minor version. Compatible with Astro 5.

react.notes: @astrojs/react 4.4.2 already supports React 19. Optional upgrade to 19.2.5 available.

tailwindcss.notes: Latest is 4.2.4 but requires @tailwindcss/vite and major config migration. Staying on 3.x for stability.

zod.notes: Latest is 4.3.6 but requires Astro 6 and significant schema migration. Staying on 3.x.

eslint.notes: Downgraded from 10.2.1 for compatibility with eslint-plugin-jsx-a11y@6.10.2 (requires eslint ^3-9).

typescript.notes: Latest stable. Some peer dependency warnings with tsconfck and zod-to-ts but functional.

nodejs.notes: Well above Astro 5 requirement (18+) and Astro 6 requirement (22.12.0+).

knownIssues: @eslint/js@10.0.1 prefers eslint@10+ but using eslint@9.18.0 for compatibility
tsconfck@3.1.6 prefers typescript@5.x but using typescript@6.0.3
zod-to-ts@1.2.0 prefers typescript@4.9.4-5.0.2 but using typescript@6.0.3
npm audit reports 12 vulnerabilities (3 low, 8 moderate, 1 high)
